{"code": "from Bio.Graphics import BasicChromosome as BC
from Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome import Chromosome
from reportlab.graphics.shapes import Drawing, String
from reportlab.lib.units import inch

def bc_chromosome_draw_label(self, cur_drawing, label_name):
    """Draw a label for the chromosome ABOVE the chromosome (PRIVATE)."""
    x_position = 0.5 * (self.start_x_position + self.end_x_position)
    y_position = self.start_y_position - 10
    
    label_string = String(x_position, y_position, label_name)
    label_string.fontName = "Times-BoldItalic"
    label_string.fontSize = self.title_size
    label_string.textAnchor = "middle"
    
    cur_drawing.add(label_string)


def main():
    # Monkey-patch the drawing method
    Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label

    # Prepare drawing canvas
    dwg = Drawing(400, 100)

    # Create a chromosome and set drawing coordinates
    chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
    chrom.start_x_position = 50
    chrom.end_x_position   = 350
    chrom.start_y_position = 20
    chrom.title_size       = 14

    # Draw label above the chromosome
    chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')

    # Save to SVG for verification
    dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
    print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()"}
